chunks.text:
Deck Masters Patios — Custom deck and patio builder in the Wylie area. Services:
- Custom decks
- Patio construction
- Pergolas
- Outdoor kitchens
- Deck repair and restoration

Contact Information:
- Phone: (214) 998-0996
- Email: kenny@deckmasterspatios. com
- Address: 2909 Co Rd 601, Farmersville, TX 75442
- Website: http://www. deckmasterspatios. com/
- Service Area: Wylie, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 4. 8 stars with 39 reviews.
